Customer service is outstanding. Experience is always very satisfactory. This is our second home. The staff are like family although we miss Jason this time but we are very happy he gets to take a well deserved vacation. Of course we will always come back. I was able to do my quick Binondo foodtrip this time. Though the food in the Coffee Club are a must-try.View more reviewsGuests praised the Cantonese restaurantI also liked the breakfast buffet—lots of yummy options to choose from.  9 minRizal Park4.5 (30.2K)Grand 57-hectare park featuring lawns, gardens, outdoor events & a monument to hero José Rizal.

 9 minSan Agustin Church4.6 (5.3K)Historic church constructed starting in the 16th century with vaulted ceilings & detailed frescoes.

 9 minNational Museum of Fine Arts4.7 (9.2K)Massive museum with collections of Filipino fine art, archaeology, botany, natural history & more.

 8 minMinor Basilica and Metropolitan Cathedral of the Immaculate Conception - The Manila Cathedral4.7 (7.5K)Built in 1571, this historic church is known for its ornate architecture & visits by several popes.

 9 minCasa Manila4.6 (947)This restored 1850s house is now a museum displaying Spanish colonial furniture, art & architecture.

 8 minManila Ocean Park4.2 (17.8K)Aquatic theme park & educational facility featuring hands-on activities, an oceanarium & live shows.

 9 minMinor Basilica & National Shrine of Jesus Nazareno / Quiapo Church (Archdiocese of Manila)4.7 (12.5K)Catholic church containing a revered 17th-century statue of Jesus called the Black Nazarene.

 10 minSM Mall of Asia4.5 (62.1K)Massive bayfront shopping mall with an amusement park, theater, restaurants & convention center.

 26 minMalacañang Palace4.5 (1.1K)Presidential museum & library showcasing Philippine politics, culture & history, with tours.

 18 minNational Museum of Natural History4.7 (5.9K)Zoological, botanical & geological specimens displayed in an elegant venue with a soaring atrium.

 7 minMinor Basilica of San Sebastian and Archdiocesan Shrine of Our Lady of Mount Carmel (Archdiocese of Manila)4.7 (1.4K)Built in 1891, this striking Gothic church has steel vaulting, stained-glass windows & 2 towers.

 13 minNational Museum of Anthropology4.6 (1.7K)Stately, neoclassical museum housing a broad collection of Filipino cultural materials & artifacts.

 8 minMinor Basilica and National Shrine of Saint Lorenzo Ruiz (Binondo Church)4.6 (3.5K)Landmark granite church with a 16th-century bell tower, featuring regular masses & self-led tours.

 9 minAyala Museum4.6 (1.6K)Modern museum for Filipino archeological artifacts, history & culture exhibits & a research library.
